profil.nama: PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusa Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusa Tbk engages in the IT transportation telematics and systems development activities to passenger and freight transportation industries in Indonesia. The company provides safety fleet management system, public transport and logistic solutions, intelligent traffic control system, Internet of Things (IoT) smart bus, tourism solutions, smart street lighting, digital payment solutions, transit-oriented development, terminal operating system, smart command center, railways monitoring solutions, identification and booking system, maintenance and LiDAR system. It also offers Software as a Service solution, including transit management, project management, and smart parking; and telematic smart devices for public transport, maritime and mining sector. In addition, the company provides business process outsourcing, which includes customer service management, human resources, information technology systems, and real-time performance reporting; three-wheel electric vehicle solutions; revolutionizing transportation; battery electric vehicle; new energy vehicle; battery energy storage system; and charging facilities for electric vehicles. PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusa Tbk was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia.
